ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_quality_score FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_score") REFERENCES data_quality_ratings ("rating"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., NSW, Australia) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., Survey, Census) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data collection method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_methods_reliability_score FOREIGN KEY ("reliability_score") REFERENCES data_reliability_ratings ("rating")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's Degree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "average_years_of_education" INTEGER /* Average years of education for this level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status (e.g., Employed, Unemployed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "average_earnings" REAL /* Average earnings for this employment status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married, Single) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age for this marital status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for this bracket */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the individual belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level of the individual */,
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment status of the individual */,
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status of the individual */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income bracket of the individual */,
  "re74" REAL /* Real earnings in 1974 */,
  "re75" REAL /* Real earnings in 1975 */,
  "re78" REAL /* Real earnings in 1978 */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the individual */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_employment_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the education data belongs to */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved */,
  "years_of_education" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution where the education was obtained */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the employment data belongs to */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Current job title */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_data" (
  "marital_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital data entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the marital data belongs to */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Current marital status */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of spouse (if applicable) */,
  "marriage_date" TEXT /* Date of marriage */,
  "divorce_date" TEXT /* Date of divorce (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marital_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marital_data_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Quality score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reliability_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reliability rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Reliability score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reliability rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)
